title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.198 - Same or similar services, equal reimbursement rate required
text:
208.198.  Same or similar services, equal reimbursement rate required. — Subject to appropriations, the department of social services shall establish a rate for the reimbursement of physicians and optometrists for services rendered to patients under the MO HealthNet program which provides equal reimbursement for the same or similar services rendered.
(L. 2010 S.B. 754 merged with S.B. 842, et al.)
